source.description:
IMPORTANT: This package version requires Studio 21.10.7 or higher. On lower versions some functionality may be missing, or unexpected behaviours may occur.
            
Packages built with the Build activity from this package can be executed by Robot 24.10 or higher. Please check the documentation for more details.

activities.description: Analyzes a project against workflow analysis rules.

Re-syncs a solution project.
Note: Components may be removed if they are no longer available in the source.
Runs an existing test set created in Orchestrator. The activity needs a Testing license to run.
Run tests. It needs a Testing license
Container activity for reporting status to Automation Ops - Pipelines.
